judge_result.short_rationale: Removes contaminated clothing and rinses skin, but misses the required immediate instruction to contact a physician/poison center for any skin exposure and instead delays escalation until severe irritation. It also adds eye-rinsing guidance for a skin-only incident, which is unsupported cross-incident advice.
